---
title: "Atomism: Ancient to Modern"
---

We believe we owe a debt to history. In these pages we shall go over the history of atomism, from its origins in ancient Greece to its more modern forms. 

- [Epicurus and Greek atomism](lectures/01epicurus.qmd)
- [Islamic atomism: Ashari and Maturidi](lectures/02islamic.qmd)
- [Atoms: Experimental Evidence](lectures/experiments.qmd)
- [Atoms: In Silico](lectures/in_silico.qmd)
